title: McCarthy Tétrault recognized as a leading Canadian law firm by Chambers Canada 2024
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault recognized as a leading Canadian law firm by Chambers Canada 2024
Toronto, September 28, 2023 — Chambers Canada has once again recognized McCarthy Tétrault as a market leader for outstanding client service and industry-focused expertise across a wide array of categories.
The firm leads the 2024 Chambers Canada: Canada’s Leading Lawyers for Business directory rankings with more lawyers and practices recognized in the directory, more Band 1 practice area rankings, and for the seventh consecutive year, has the most Band 1 lawyer rankings of any Canadian firm.
In all, Chambers Canada 2024 recognized McCarthy Tétrault with:
- 31 Band 1 lawyer rankings
- 29 Band 1 practice and industry area rankings
- 222 total lawyer rankings
- 66 total practice and industry area rankings
“McCarthy Tétrault is a trusted, strategic partner for our clients, helping them navigate crucial business decisions with creative approaches and an eye to the future,” said Dave Leonard , Partner and CEO of McCarthy Tétrault. “We’re pleased that Chambers Canada continues to recognize our dedication and deep practice and industry expertise in both domestic and foreign markets, and thank our clients for their ongoing trust in our firm.”
"Being at the forefront of the legal and business decisions shaping Canada remains a key priority for the firm and our clients,” said Lara Nathans , Partner and Industry Strategy Leader, McCarthy Tétrault. “Our industry-focused expertise in Canadian and international business markets allows our clients to anticipate and adapt to the emerging and strategic issues affecting their operations''
The firm received top-tier rankings across 29 practices and industries, and Band 1 rankings in the following areas:
- Competition/Antitrust
- Corporate/Commercial : The Elite (British Columbia, Ontario, Québec)
- Dispute Resolution: Class Action (Defence)
- Employment and Labour (Canada, Ontario)
- Energy & Natural Resources: Mining
- Healthcare : Contentious
- Information Technology
- Insurance : Transactional & Regulatory
- International Trade/WTO
- Litigation: General Commercial (Canada, Ontario)
- Litigation: Securities (Ontario)
- Projects: (PPP & Infrastructure)
- Real Estate (Canada, British Columbia, Ontario, Québec)
- Telecommunications & Broadcasting
- White Collar Crime & Government Investigations
View the full list of the firm’s top-ranked lawyers.
Published since 1990, Chambers and Partners' ranks the best law firms and lawyers across 200 jurisdictions throughout the world. Rankings are based on independent and objective research, including peer and client feedback. Chambers Canada ranks law firms and lawyers in 90 practice areas and industries in Canada.
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information on McCarthy Tétrault or any of the above, please contact media@mccarthy.ca .
